lessons.title: Plan and implement security for virtual networks
lessons.content_md:
This module is designed to provide administrators with the knowledge and skills needed to plan and implement robust security measures for Azure virtual networks, ensuring the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of network resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/security-virtual-networks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and implement security for virtual networks

lessons.title: Plan and implement security for private access to Azure resources
lessons.content_md:
This module focuses on equipping administrators with the knowledge and skills required to plan and implement robust security measures for private access to Azure resources, safeguarding sensitive data and enhancing network integrity.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/security-private-access-azure-resources/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and implement security for private access to Azure resources

lessons.title: Plan and implement security for public access to Azure resources
lessons.content_md:
Plan and implement security for public access to Azure resources

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/security-public-access-azure-resources/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and implement security for public access to Azure resources

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Protect network infrastructure in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Protect network infrastructure in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
